items.title: Implement formatter contract
items.body:
## Context

Add the base `formatProgress(complete, total)` function and export it through CommonJS.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `formatProgress` returns `2/5 complete (40%)` style output
- [ ] The module exports via CommonJS
- [ ] Tests cover the nominal formatter path
items.complexity_rationale: Touches implementation and tests and defines the public formatter contract the later tasks rely on.

items.title: Clamp overflow values
items.body:
## Context

Extend the formatter so completion never exceeds total and add regression coverage.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Values above total clamp to 100 percent
- [ ] Formatted output shows clamped totals
- [ ] Tests cover overflow cases
items.complexity_rationale: Builds on the formatter contract and adds edge-case behavior plus regression tests across the same modules.
